news.title:
Motilal Oswal reaffirms buy rating on Ashok Leyland; target set at ₹185.
The rating was issued after a management meeting with the company.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal reaffirms buy rating on Ashok Leyland; target set at ₹185.
The rating was issued after a management meeting with the company.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland saw a significant rise in futures open interest on NSE F&O.
Total open interest across nine stocks increased by over 10% from the prior trade.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland saw a significant rise in futures open interest on NSE F&O.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland shares dropped 7% after March sales missed expectations, growing 5% to 25,381 units vs. projected 15% growth.
M&HCV truck sales grew 11%, bus sales fell 24%, and LCV sales rose 12%. Shares traded 1.5% lower at ₹151.75 from ₹215.75 highs.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland shares dropped 7% after March sales missed expectations, growing 5% to 25,381 units vs. projected 15% growth.
M&HCV truck sales grew 11%, bus sales fell 24%, and LCV sales rose 12%. Shares traded 1.5% lower at ₹151.75 from ₹215.75 highs.

news.title: Ashok Leyland's monthly sales missed expectations.
news.summary: Ashok Leyland's monthly sales missed expectations.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland March sales rose 5.5% YoY to 25,381 units vs 24,060.
Sales missed market estimate of 26,400 units despite YoY growth.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland March sales rose 5.5% YoY to 25,381 units vs 24,060.
Sales missed market estimate of 26,400 units despite YoY growth.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 16.6 cr for 1,062,203 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 155.86 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.
news.summary:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.

news.title:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland fell 9% and 5% intraday, underperforming BSE Auto index (-1.9%).
Oil price surge amid West Asia war threatens inflation, CV demand, and GDP growth despite healthy retail CV demand.
news.summary:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland fell 9% and 5% intraday, underperforming BSE Auto index (-1.9%).
Oil price surge amid West Asia war threatens inflation, CV demand, and GDP growth despite healthy retail CV demand.

news.title:
The PM eBus Sewa scheme plans to deploy 10,000 e-buses by 2027, benefiting JBM Auto, Tata Motors, and Olectra Greentech.
Ashok Leyland, Amara Raja, and Sona BLW may gain from rising EV demand driven by government orders and infrastructure expansion.
news.summary:
The PM eBus Sewa scheme plans to deploy 10,000 e-buses by 2027, benefiting JBM Auto, Tata Motors, and Olectra Greentech.
Ashok Leyland, Amara Raja, and Sona BLW may gain from rising EV demand driven by government orders and infrastructure expansion.

news.title:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.
news.summary:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland to invest up to GBP 30M (~₹375 Cr) in Optare Plc, its UK subsidiary.
Post-investment, Ashok Leyland's stake in Optare Plc will increase to 93.28% from 93%.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland to invest up to GBP 30M (~₹375 Cr) in Optare Plc, its UK subsidiary.
Post-investment, Ashok Leyland's stake in Optare Plc will increase to 93.28% from 93%.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland gain as MHI extends EV motor localisation deadline to Sept 2026.
Relief expected for manufacturers ramping up electric bus and vehicle deployments across India.
news.summary:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland gain as MHI extends EV motor localisation deadline to Sept 2026.
Relief expected for manufacturers ramping up electric bus and vehicle deployments across India.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.

news.title:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.
news.summary:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland begins building a battery plant in Tamil Nadu for electric trucks and buses, investing ₹400-500 crore.
Facility supports EV localization, Tamil Nadu’s EV Policy 2023, and India's net-zero emission goals by 2070.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland begins building a battery plant in Tamil Nadu for electric trucks and buses, investing ₹400-500 crore.
Facility supports EV localization, Tamil Nadu’s EV Policy 2023, and India's net-zero emission goals by 2070.

news.title:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.
news.summary:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.

news.title:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.
news.summary:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland reports February 2026 sales: total domestic vehicles up 28%, exports up 24%.
M&HCV trucks grew 33% in exports; cumulative domestic sales rose 14% across categories.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland reports February 2026 sales: total domestic vehicles up 28%, exports up 24%.
M&HCV trucks grew 33% in exports; cumulative domestic sales rose 14% across categories.

news.title:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
news.summary:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
